since_last: 27% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads -0.06%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 27% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.06% · BTC +2.53% · Gold +1.66% · Nasdaq100 -1.31%. 27% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at -0.06%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.06%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -9.85%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +9.43%, ISRG +4.22%, AAPL +4.11%, RXRX +3.00%, ADBE +2.98%. Laggards: TER -9.85%, KLAC -9.37%, AMAT -8.06%, LRCX -7.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.29% at $158.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
